steps.title: Identify what the blank must signal
steps.content: The passage describes a process where the cloth simmers for an extended period (“hours, perhaps even days”), and the blank must transition to the next stage after this wait.

steps.title: Select the word expressing what happens after waiting
steps.content: ”Eventually” directly shows that cloth removal comes after the extended simmering period. The other three introduce contrast, similarity, or restatement rather than forward progression. This matches choice C — C is correct.
